title: worldly weapons
description: a mod that adds obscure weapons from around the world
body: I've recently gotten into modding and I've realized that most weapons mods have the same few types of weapons which is why I've decided to create a mod that has many obscure and often forgotten weapons. Enter Worldly Weapons, a mod that adds obscure weapons from around the world, Although it is still a work in progress, updates will be slow since this is only a hobby for me at the moment.
